title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.025 - POW and MIA designations recognized
text:
41.025.  POW and MIA designations recognized. — The state of Missouri hereby recognizes the designations of Prisoner of War (POW) and Missing in Action (MIA) as valid descriptions of casualty status and category classification for military personnel.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1524 & 2260)
